hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$ ]] && npx @biomejs/biome check --fix "$f" || true; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]] || exit 0; if [[ "$f" =~ \.(test|spec)\.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then t="$f"; else t="${f%.*}.test.${f##*.}"; fi; [ -f "$t" ] && npx vitest run "$t" || true; }
